rationale: The proposed homestead exemption change under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §254.152, which governs timing of campaign expenditure reports by general-purpose committees.
quote: If a general-purpose committee makes a political expenditure in the form of a political contribution to another general-purpose committee or to an out-of-state political committee and the contributing committee does not intend that the contribution be used in connection with a particular election, the contributing committee shall include the expenditure in the first report required to be filed under this subchapter after the expenditure is made.
_note: No conflict: the rule_text concerns election campaign finance reporting and is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
